bead.title: agentcli: scrub ModelRef and legacy policy vocabulary regressions
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-399ecb48 found a later commit reintroduced ModelRef naming in agentcli/models.go and fiz catalog still prints legacy standard policy vocabulary. ADR-009/FEAT-006 require Policy terminology and removal of ModelRef/profile-era vocabulary from public CLI surfaces.

In scope:
- agentcli/models.go and related CLI output/tests
- any docs or help text necessary to keep CLI vocabulary aligned

Out of scope:
- Service routing legacy alias acceptance; reopened separately in fizeau-22a93208.
bead.acceptance:
1. rg -n "ModelRef|model-ref|standard|code-fast|code-smart|code-economy|offline" agentcli cmd/fiz docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-006-standalone-cli.md --glob "*.go" --glob "*.md" returns no production/help hits except historical migration notes explicitly marked as removed.
2. go test ./agentcli ./cmd/fiz -run "TestCLI.*Policies|TestCLI.*Catalog|TestModels" -count=1 passes.
3. go test ./agentcli ./cmd/fiz -count=1 passes.

events.body: {"rationale":"","score":0,"suggested_fixes":null,"waivers_applied":null,"warning":"lint hook: dispatch-failure: ResolveRoute: policy \"air-gapped\" has no candidate satisfying local endpoint: 5 candidates rejected"}
